DEFENDANT ANGELO'S TOWING'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING CASE TO APPROPRIATE COURT (CHANGE OF VENUE) [CCP 396B].

Matter called. The Court was informed by the parties that the matter had settled and that the motion should go off calendar. At the request of the parties, the Court vacated the tentative ruling and took the matter off calender.
